OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: PracticeOperationsChangeRequestFetchData

omniProcessElements.name: DR_FetchForwardingContracts
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "recordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"SELECT Id FROM RecordType WHERE DeveloperName = '{0}' AND SobjectType = '{1}' LIMIT 01\",\"Client\",\"Contract\")", "accountId" : "%accountId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTEFetchContractRecords", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DR_ForCoverageChange
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "executionConditionalFormula" : "%CoverageChange% == "Yes" && ((ISNOTBLANK(LA_CheckCoverageChange) && %SV_MxdBagForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCase:isBlank%) || ISBLANK(LA_CheckCoverageChange))


", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContractId" : "=%LA_ForCloningContract|1:Id%", "type" : "="Shift"" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTEFetchCPAForContractCloning", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DR_ForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCase
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%CoverageChange% == \"Yes\" && ISNOTBLANK(LA_CheckCoverageChange)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContractId" : "=%LA_CheckCoverageChange|1:Id%", "type" : "=\"Shift\"" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTEFetchCPAForContractCloning", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DT_ContractForEligibleClonning
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "\n(%CoverageChange% == \"No\" && ISBLANK(LA_NoCoverageChange)) || (%CoverageChange% == \"Yes\" &&\n((ISBLANK(%LA_CheckCoverageChange%) && %SV_MxdBagForCoverageChange:isBlank%) || (ISNOTBLANK(%LA_CheckCoverageChange%) && %SV_MxdBagForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCase:isBlank% && %SV_MxdBagForCoverageChange:isBlank%) ))", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "contract" : "=%LA_ForCloningContract|1%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTTransformPractiseOpContractRecsForCloning", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DT_TransformContractRecsForPracOp
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "Contracts" : "%DR_FetchForwardingContracts:Contracts%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTTransformContractRecsForPracOp", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LA_CheckCoverageChange
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%CoverageChange% == \"Yes\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DT_TransformContractRecsForPracOp" ], "filterListFormula" : "StartDate > \"%ContractStartDate%\" && Status == \"Executed\"", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction5", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LA_DraftContracts
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DT_TransformContractRecsForPracOp" ], "filterListFormula" : "Status == \"Draft\" || Status == \"In Progress\" || Status == \"Submitted\"", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LA_ExecutedContracts
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DT_TransformContractRecsForPracOp" ], "filterListFormula" : "Status == \"Executed\" || Status == \"Superseded\"", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LA_ForCloningContract
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "(%CoverageChange% == \"No\" && ISBLANK(LA_NoCoverageChange)) || (%CoverageChange% == \"Yes\" && ((ISNOTBLANK(LA_CheckCoverageChange) && %SV_MxdBagForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCase:isBlank%) || ISBLANK(LA_CheckCoverageChange)))", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ "StartDate" ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : true, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DT_TransformContractRecsForPracOp" ], "filterListFormula" : "StartDate < \"%ContractStartDate%\" && (Status == \"Executed\" || Status == \"Superseded\")", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction8", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LA_MergeDraftAndOverlappingContracts
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "LA_DraftContracts", "LA_OverlappingContracts" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction4", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LA_NoCoverageChange
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%CoverageChange% == \"No\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DT_TransformContractRecsForPracOp" ], "filterListFormula" : "StartDate > \"%ContractStartDate%\" && Status == \"Executed\" && Shift_Coverage_Change__c == \"false\"", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction5", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LA_OverlappingContracts
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DT_TransformContractRecsForPracOp" ], "filterListFormula" : "StartDate == \"%ContractStartDate%\" && Status == \"Executed\"", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: RA_FirstValidationForError
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%LA_MergeDraftAndOverlappingContracts%) || ISBLANK(%LA_ExecutedContracts%)", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "ListOfContractsForErrorStep" : "=%LA_MergeDraftAndOverlappingContracts%", "ListSizeDraftContracts" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%LA_DraftContracts%),0,LISTSIZE(%LA_DraftContracts%))", "ListSizeOverLappingContracts" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%LA_OverlappingContracts%),0,LISTSIZE(%LA_OverlappingContracts%))", "ListSizeExecutedContracts" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%LA_ExecutedContracts%),0,LISTSIZE(%LA_ExecutedContracts%))", "showNoCoverageError" : "=false", "showErrorStep" : "=ISNOTBLANK(%LA_MergeDraftAndOverlappingContracts%)", "showCoverageErrorForCoverageChange" : "=false" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction4", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: RA_ForCoverageChangeInsertAtNewFutureDate
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(%LA_MergeDraftAndOverlappingContracts%) && ISNOTBLANK(%LA_ExecutedContracts%) && %CoverageChange% == \"Yes\" && ISBLANK(%LA_CheckCoverageChange%)", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "ListOfContractsForErrorStep" : "=%LA_ForCloningContract|1%", "ListSizeDraftContracts" : "=0", "ListSizeOverLappingContracts" : "=0", "ListSizeExecutedContracts" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%LA_ExecutedContracts%),0,LISTSIZE(%LA_ExecutedContracts%))", "showNoCoverageError" : "=false", "ContractEligibleForCloning" : "=%DT_ContractForEligibleClonning%", "showErrorStep" : "=NOT(%SV_MxdBagForCoverageChange:isBlank%)", "showCoverageErrorForCoverageChange" : "=NOT(%SV_MxdBagForCoverageChange:isBlank%)" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: RA_ForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCaseFutureDate
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(%LA_MergeDraftAndOverlappingContracts%) && ISNOTBLANK(%LA_ExecutedContracts%) && %CoverageChange% == \"Yes\" && ISNOTBLANK(%LA_CheckCoverageChange%)", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "ListOfContractsForErrorStep" : "=IF(NOT(%SV_MxdBagForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCase:isBlank%), %LA_CheckCoverageChange|1%, IF(NOT(%SV_MxdBagForCoverageChange:isBlank%), %LA_ForCloningContract|1%,null))", "ListSizeDraftContracts" : "=0", "ListSizeOverLappingContracts" : "=0", "ListSizeExecutedContracts" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%LA_ExecutedContracts%),0,LISTSIZE(%LA_ExecutedContracts%))", "showNoCoverageError" : "=false", "ContractEligibleForCloning" : "=%DT_ContractForEligibleClonning%", "showErrorStep" : "=NOT(%SV_MxdBagForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCase:isBlank%) || NOT(%SV_MxdBagForCoverageChange:isBlank%)", "showCoverageErrorForCoverageChange" : "=NOT(%SV_MxdBagForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCase:isBlank%) || NOT(%SV_MxdBagForCoverageChange:isBlank%)" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: RA_ForNoCoverageChange
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(%LA_MergeDraftAndOverlappingContracts%) && ISNOTBLANK(%LA_ExecutedContracts%) && %CoverageChange% == \"No\" ", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "ListOfContractsForErrorStep" : "=%LA_NoCoverageChange%", "ListSizeDraftContracts" : "=0", "ListSizeOverLappingContracts" : "=0", "ListSizeExecutedContracts" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%LA_ExecutedContracts%),0,LISTSIZE(%LA_ExecutedContracts%))", "ContractEligibleForCloning" : "=%DT_ContractForEligibleClonning%", "showNoCoverageError" : "=ISNOTBLANK(%LA_NoCoverageChange%)", "showErrorStep" : "=ISNOTBLANK(%LA_NoCoverageChange%)", "showCoverageErrorForCoverageChange" : "=false" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SV_MxdBagForCoverageChange
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "isBlank" : "=IF(DR_ForCoverageChange == \"{}\", true, false)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SV_MxdBagForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCase
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "isBlank" : "=IF(DR_ForCoverageChangeInsertInBetweenCase == \"{}\", true, false)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
